training.title: Breaking PRs with Strongman Lars Rørbakken : ArmWrestling Style
training.summary:
We're back in the Monster Factory for PR day, Monster Michael Todd is aiming for new personal records and @LarsRor  is getting his starting weights to add these armwrestling specific lifts into his training. Watch as we engage in various strength training exercises and intense arm wrestling preparations. This session is all about pushing limits and improving our table strength. Get ready for some serious armwrestling training action! or..... maybe it's all ego? 
Join this channel to get access to perks:https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCarJKBV9GEpXRHrw4bEEhHA/join
